query: INSERT INTO governance_records (recordId, title, recordType, govStatus, blockRef, description, content, iCardUrl) VALUES ('GOV-DOMAIN-001', 'DOMAIN-CHANGE-001: Unauthorized Domain Change', 'incident_report', 'active', 'B410', 'AI agent recreated TRE project on 20 March 2026, causing Manus platform to assign new domain prefix epdhlkrn replacing original andhlkrn.
